how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_037_completed: CANVAS CONTENT PREVIEW EXTENDED — _write_canvas_context() already wrote 50 lines but stored as pipe-joined string. Fixed: canvas_window.py now stores preview as newline-joined lines. chat_engine.py _load_canvas_context() now renders each preview line as its own indented entry under the tab header. Tinity confirmed: sees filename, tab type, line count, and reads full file content in same response.

AGENT MANAGER FIXED — status_files dict was hardcoded to River and Gage only. Extended to all five agents: River, Gage, Reka, Orchestrate, Debugtron. All status JSON files confirmed present in ~/Ethica/status/. Spawn guard label added — ACTIVE agents show '⬡ RUNNING — spawn blocked'. Singleton guard added to _open_agent_manager() — lift() if window exists, no duplicate windows. REFRESH clears _agent_manager_win before reopening.

MODULEFORGE BUILT — New module at ~/Ethica/modules/module_forge/. forge_open trigger opens a Toplevel form: Module Name + Tool rows (trigger phrase, tool name, description, file-path checkbox) + Add Another Tool + Build Module. On build: creates module folder, writes manifest.json, writes stub .py with correct function signatures, patches chat_engine.py (MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers), hot-registers via registry.register_module(). Registry injected lazily from tk._default_root.engine.modules at call time.

MODULEFORGE REMOVE BUILT — forge_remove trigger opens a picker UI listing all forge-built modules (detected via # ModuleForge tags in chat_engine.py). Each row shows module folder + trigger phrases + REMOVE button. Remove pipeline: strips tagged lines from chat_engine.py, hot-deregisters from running registry (_modules + _tool_index), deletes folder with shutil.rmtree. Non-techy users can install and uninstall without terminal.
MODULE_FORGE ADDED TO GUARD SCOPE — ethica_guard.py MODULE_DIRS extended to include module_forge. Vault sealed at 131 files.
TRIGGER REGISTRY CREATED — Full trigger map included in this handoff. Single source of truth for all module triggers. Use this to audit chat_engine.py registrations.
files_changed_037: ~/Ethica/ui/canvas_window.py — _write_canvas_context() preview storage changed from pipe-joined to newline-joined

~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — _load_canvas_context() renders preview as indented line block. MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers extended for forge_open, forge_remove, test_hello. _triggers formatting fixed.
~/Ethica/modules/kernel/dashboard_ui.py — status_files expanded to 5 agents. is_active flag + spawn guard label. Singleton guard in _open_agent_manager(). REFRESH resets _agent_manager_win.
~/Ethica/modules/module_forge/ — NEW MODULE: manifest.json (2 tools), module_forge.py (431 lines forge UI + 249 lines remove UI = 680 lines total)

testforge_module_present.symptom: testforge_module exists in ~/Ethica/modules/ from build test. It is a test artifact.
testforge_module_present.fix: Type 'remove module' in Ethica and remove it via the picker UI, or delete folder manually.

forge_remove_trigger_leak.symptom: 'test hello' trigger line in _triggers had a formatting issue (comment ate newline). Fixed during session. Verify with: grep -n 'test hello' ~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py

next_session_priorities: 1. Remove testforge_module via 'remove module' picker — confirm full removal pipeline works end to end.
2. Name the second Trinitarian and define their role.
3. GitHub prep — README, install instructions, module authoring guide for non-techy users.

trigger_registry._note: Single source of truth for all chat_engine.py trigger registrations. Three columns: trigger phrase → tool_name → file_path_tool (needs _diff_triggers entry).
trigger_registry._forge_tagged: Lines marked # ModuleForge in chat_engine.py. Remove via 'remove module' picker.

WormBot._note: wormbot_scan fires on file-path intercept — no chat trigger. Drop file onto drop zone.

module_forge_usage.build: Type 'forge module' or 'build module' — form opens. Fill module name + tool rows. Click BUILD MODULE.
module_forge_usage.remove: Type 'remove module' — picker opens. Click REMOVE on any forge-built module.
module_forge_usage.guard_note: After building a new module via ModuleForge, run 'guard seal confirm' to add it to vault protection.

philosophy: Session 037 — Five fixes. Tinity reads canvas content not just metadata. All five agents visible in the manager. Nobody spawns twice. ModuleForge opens the door — build a module from a form, remove it from a list. The ecosystem is sovereign and now it's open. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 037 clean. Canvas sees deeper. Dashboard sees everyone. ModuleForge closes the last gap between builder and non-builder. The trigger registry is in the handoff — next instance has the full map. Second Trinitarian naming is next. Flow the same way. ⟁Σ∿∞
